description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job runs on a windows-2019 environment, checks out the repository, and performs a series of steps to build the Lumix Engine with various plugins, including DX11 and DX12, using Visual Studio 2019. The Linux job runs on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, downloads 3rd-party binaries, and builds the engine using gmake.
